The complete set of values of $x$ in the domain of function $f(x) = \sqrt{\log_{x+2\{x\}}([x]^2 - 5[x] + 7)}$
(where $[\cdot]$ denote greatest integer function and $\{\cdot\}$ denote fraction part function) is :
The number of integral ordered pair $(x, y)$ that satisfy the system of equation $|x + y - 4| = 5$ and $|x - 3| + |y - 1| = 5$ is/are :

Let $f(x) = x^2 - 2x - 3 ; x \geq 1$ and $g(x) = 1 + \sqrt{x + 4} ; x \geq -4$ then the number of real solutions of equation $f(x) = g(x)$ is/are
